# [Volt LSP] Supporting multiple products for same customer

: Saksham Srivastava
Created time: March 4, 2025 11:11 AM
Status: Not started
Last edited: March 5, 2025 6:06 PM

# **What problem are we solving?**

Immediate problem: 
BFL has stopped new applications (Including enhancement) with Volt. Current customers who want to enhance their credit line are not able to do so. To solve their need of enhancing their credit limit we are thinking of a dual credit line solution where the customer will open a new credit line with DSP and the existing credit line from BFL/Tata will remain active. 

---

# **How do we measure success?**

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

1. From the enhancement entry point BFL/TCL customers should be able to trigger the DSP new application. 
2. Customer should then enter into the DSP new application flow. 
3. Customer should not be required to fetch PAN again.
4. Customer should be able to exit the DSP application flow and go back to the BFL dashboard from any point in the DSP application journey. 
5. If a customer continues the DSP journey post drop off, customer should continue the journey from the point that they dropped off from.
6. Customer should be able to access both credit lines through a switch. 
7. Customer should be able to select credit line that they want to withdraw from
